first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10) in both evaluations. The core justification for rejection is also identical and stated as the primary reason in both: the candidate lacks the mandatory 8 years of C++ experience. The minor variations in the wording of strengths and concerns are well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect a substantive change in the assessment. The model correctly identified the same critical flaw regardless of the prestige of the employer names.
